mapper.select: SELECT form_code, form_name FROM mdm_form ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT f.id, f.form_code, f.form_name, f.sort, f.create_time, f.create_by, f.update_time, f.update_by, f.remark, f.version, COUNT(i.id) item_count FROM mdm_form f LEFT JOIN mdm_form_item i ON i.form_code = f.form_code AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND f.form_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{formCode}, '%') AND f.form_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{formName}, '%') GROUP BY f.id ORDER BY f.sort ASC, f.id ASC
SELECT form_code, form_name FROM mdm_form WHERE deleted = 0 AND form_code = #{formCode};
SELECT form_code, form_name FROM mdm_form WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
